scenario: R1 max_age dead-code removal regression (bulk, behavior-neutral)
warning_text: 보안 경고 — 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request was blocked due to sensitive information.)
notes: windows-mcp AVAILABLE and used (GUI). Navigating fresh to blackbox.ai and blackbox.ai/chat both yield page-replacement block: tab title '보안 정책 - 접근 차단', blank document body, '보안 경고' warning toast containing '보안 정책'. Persisted across hard-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R, cache-bypass) and a brand-new tab — confirmed reproducible network-level fresh block, not browser cache. blackbox SPA on /chat auto-restores the prior PII conversation and replays the PII message to /api/chat, which the engine intercepts and replaces with the block page; therefore the composer never renders so PII could not be re-typed this run, but the block fired end-to-end and the warning containing '보안 정책' is visible. Engine intercept fired = page replaced.
